definitions.text: Devoid of content; containing nothing or nobody; vacant.
Containing no elements (as of a string, array, or set), opposed to being null (having no valid value).
Free; clear; devoid; often with of.
To make empty; to remove the contents of.
examples: to empty a well or a cistern
The cinema emptied quickly after the end of the film.

definitions.text: Of a river, duct, etc: to drain or flow toward an ultimate destination.
examples: Salmon River empties on the W shore about 2 miles below Bear River.

definitions.text: A container, especially a bottle, whose contents have been used up, leaving it empty.
examples: Put the empties out to be recycled.
